info.english_meaning: to agitate to churn to stir to roll
info.kOmudIDAtukramANkaH: sidDAntakOmudyAm ayaM DAtuH pfTak rUpeRa pAWitaH nAsti  parantu 1.351 luwa~ ityatra 'qAnto'yamityeke' ityanena ayaM pAWaBedaH nirdizwaH vartate

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'tAta nodaDiviloqanaM prati tvadvinATa vayamutsahAmahe' (SiSu0 1483) viloqanaM manTanam
'viloqyamAne tasmiMstu srutatoye jalASaye' (BA0 SAM0 13713) viloqyamAne kzoByamARe
'mandArARAmudArARAM vanAni pariloqayan' (BA0 saBA0 107) pariloqayan kzuBnan AkulAni kurvan
